text:
Created attachment 164192
Preprocessed source(s) and associated run script(s) are located at: /tmp/lab-e1d5f8.c exceeds set File size limit?

Bug report advisory Re: grapviz upgrade with portupgrade followed by build attempt faailure

Thread at https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2013-September/085869.html 
"What is MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE?
Thomas Mueller mueller6724 at bellsouth.net
Mon Sep 9 20:22:02 UTC 2013"

Implies that "MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE?" is the current default and therefore redundant.
Rebuild was not attempted, but had been attempted several times before.
--------
Instructions on build failure

PLEASE ATTACH THE FOLLOWING FILES TO THE BUG REPORT:
Preprocessed source(s) and associated run script(s) are located at:
cc: note: diagnostic msg: /tmp/lab-e1d5f8.c
cc: note: diagnostic msg: /tmp/lab-e1d5f8.sh
cc: note: diagnostic msg:
--------
/tmp/lab-e1d5f8.c already exceeds set file size limit of 1000KB / actual file is 11058 KB

What next to do?
